content.question: The causal contribution of tracking-age delay alone versus the full Finnish policy bundle (welfare expansion, teacher-education upgrade, curricular change) remains uncertain; isolating the tracking effect requires counterfactual scenarios not available from Finnish data.
content.reduction_path: Natural experiments or quasi-experimental designs in other countries that de-tracked without simultaneous welfare expansion or teacher-education reform, or conversely, countries that made those investments without de-tracking.
